title: galium mollugo var. scabrum
intro: Galium mollugo var. scabrum, also known as rough bedstraw, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Galium genus, typically found in temperate regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Galium mollugo var. scabrum include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied.
